meta.title: AoD | Politics, Power and the Meaning of Victory in Ukraine (feat. Luke Coffey)
meta.description: Senior Fellow Luke Coffey joins the show to break down Ukraine funding, the state of the counter-offensive and how politics plays out in great power conflicts. Additionally, Coffey illustrates why the outcome in Ukraine is directly related to America's role and reputation around the globe.
